title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indigo Paints South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Indigo Paints South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Indigo Paints South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indigo Paints South Asia Partners:
Indigo Paints South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints South Asia Partners!
